results.rendered_html:
bhṛśa a. (compar. bhraśīyas, superl. bhraśiṣṭha)
1 Strong, powerful, mighty, intense excessive, very much.
2 Frequent.
— śaṃ ind.
1 Much, very much, exceedingly, intensely, violently, excessively in a high degree, greatly; tamavekṣya ruroda sā bhṛśaṃ  Ku. 4. 26 ; raghurbhṛśaṃ vakṣasi sena tāḍitaḥ  R. 3. 61  cukrepa tasmai sa bhṛśaṃ 3. 56 ;  Ms. 7. 170 ;  Rs. 1. 11. 
2 Often, repeatedly.
3 In a better or superior manner.
Comp.
— kopana a. highly choleric or irascible.
— duḥkhita, pīḍita a. exceedingly afflicted.
— saṃhṛṣṭa a. very much delighted.
